race.description: Brisbane Airport Conference Centre Mdn Hcp
race.comment: SENSE OF DUTY (1) went down by the narrowest of margins at Murwillumbah on debut and will have taken a stack of benefit from that race-day experience. Jockey Lerena stays on board and can go one better against this line-up. CAPTIVATE LEGEND (14) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Capable of bouncing right back. BRASH MAGIC (6) just missed the frame here when facing the starter for the first time and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Top-three candidate. BASSETT'S CHOICE (18) next in line. Much better effort last time when second.
